titleStmt.title: SII 17.716: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 716. (A.R. No. 659 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 16 buffaloes left under the charge of the Śiva brāhmaṇas of the temple, by Nakula[n] Viḻuppādarāyan, a mudali of Vīranāra siṅgadēva-yādavarāya who bears the birudas Rājāśraya and Śaśikula-chāḷukki, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-piḷḷaiyār, at Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kuṉṟavattaṉa-kōṭṭam, a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirakaṇṭakopālatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatu
śrī rājāśraya śaśikula cāḷukki viranāraciṅkatevanāṉa yātavarāyar mutali nakulan viḻuppāta
rāyaneṉ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu taṉiyūr
niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyaār tirukkārikaraip piḷḷaiyārkku vaitta tirunun nuntāviḷa
kkukku viṭṭa Erumai 10 6 Ippiḷḷaiyārkku viṭṭa Erumai patināṟum kaik
koṇṭom Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇarom .
Digital edition of SII 17.716 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
